metaTitle: Pigeon Control NYC | Bird Deterrent Installation | The Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional pigeon control and deterrent installation in NYC. Spikes, netting, exclusion systems. Commercial and residential. Licensed specialists. Call now.
h1: Pigeon Control in NYC — Long-Term Deterrence, Not Just Cleanup
heroParagraph: Pigeon droppings are acidic enough to damage concrete, corrode metal, and clog HVAC systems. A roosting pigeon population deposits thousands of pounds of waste annually on NYC buildings, creating slip hazards, structural damage, and public health risks. Our pigeon control programs use physical deterrents — stainless steel spikes, anti-perch systems, and exclusion netting — to eliminate roosting sites permanently, without harm to the birds.
